articles.title: What's Going On With Nike Stock Today?
articles.summary: Nike Inc. stock gained in premarket trading on Tuesday following news of a new $1 billion credit line and a $300 million restructuring plan. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $79.70 ahead of its Mar. 31 earnings report, where EPS is estimated at 30 cents and revenue at $11.25 billion.
